name: content-collection
description: Config-driven content collections (services, solutions, portfolio, team, …) on one collection_item table. Public read API + admin CRUD; items carry a jsonb metadata field for project-specific fields. Managed card/detail components + owned pages ship with the web side.

inject.text: { href: "/admin/collections", label: (t) => t.collections.nav, icon: LayersIcon, adminOnly: true },

### content-collection
- One `collection_item` table backs any card-list content type, keyed by `collection` (e.g. "services", "portfolio"). Public API: `GET /collections/:collection`, `GET /collections/:collection/:slug` (published only). Admin CRUD under `/admin/collections`.
- Extend an item with project-specific fields via its `metadata` (jsonb) — no migration. Render `body` with the `markdown` module's `<Markdown/>`.

instructions: Create the content_collection table:  npm run migration:run -w <app>-api
Seed items via the admin UI (/admin/collections) or POST /admin/collections as an admin.
Add project-specific fields per item in its metadata (jsonb) — no schema change needed.
